steps.title: Recognize vertical angles
steps.content: When two lines intersect at a point, they form four angles around the intersection point. The two pairs of opposite angles are called vertical angles.

steps.title: Find s using the vertical angles theorem
steps.content: In the diagram, angles $s$ and $\gamma$ are vertical angles—positioned opposite each other at the intersection point. Since vertical angles are equal and $\gamma = 61°$, we conclude that $s = 61°$.
